prompt: Run a full A01 Ad Intelligence Initial Scan for a women's health supplement brand selling a gut health powder. The brand is called 'BellyBliss' and competes against AG1, Seed, and Ritual. Focus on Meta and TikTok. Produce the complete AD-INTELLIGENCE-HANDOFF.md.
expected_output: A comprehensive AD-INTELLIGENCE-HANDOFF.md with 500+ scraped ads classified by hook type (32-type taxonomy), format analysis, visual style mapping, top 20 winning specimens with verbatim copy, and opportunity gap identification across Meta and TikTok for the gut health supplement vertical.
assertions: Output contains AD-INTELLIGENCE-HANDOFF.md or equivalent handoff document
At least 10 competitor brands are analyzed
Ads are classified using the 32-type hook taxonomy
Top winning specimens include verbatim ad copy transcriptions
Opportunity gaps are identified with specific underused hook types
Both Meta and TikTok platforms are covered
Format distribution analysis is included (video vs static vs carousel ratios)
Visual style analysis is present (UGC vs polished vs text-heavy)

prompt: I have pre-scraped data from Meta Ad Spy for Performance Golf competitors. Run A01 in Tool-Assisted Scan mode for a golf instruction brand. Competitors include Me And My Golf, Rick Shiels, and Titleist Performance Institute. Classify everything and produce the intelligence handoff.
expected_output: AD-INTELLIGENCE-HANDOFF.md produced from pre-scraped data import, with full classification of all imported ads by hook type, format, visual style, and duration. Golf vertical-specific opportunity gaps identified.
assertions: Tool-Assisted Scan mode is correctly identified and executed
Pre-scraped data import process is described or executed
Hook type classification covers all imported ads
Opportunity gaps reference golf-specific messaging whitespace

prompt: This is a bi-weekly Continuous Monitor run for an active campaign. The previous AD-INTELLIGENCE-HANDOFF.md was produced 2 weeks ago for a men's health testosterone supplement brand. Scan for new competitor ads and produce an INTELLIGENCE-UPDATE.md with deltas.
expected_output: INTELLIGENCE-UPDATE.md containing only delta changes since the last scan — new competitor ads, new hook types appearing, format shifts, and emerging trends in the testosterone supplement ad landscape.
assertions: Continuous Monitor mode is correctly identified
Output is an INTELLIGENCE-UPDATE.md (not full handoff)
Delta analysis is present (new ads since last scan)
New trends or shifts are identified
Reference to previous scan baseline is included
